rulings.Case Title: DAVID W. GUERDAT VS. SALLY A. UNTERBERGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF DAVID GUERDAT'S Motion To Enforce Settlement GRANTED as follows: (1) interlocutory judgment shall be entered; (2) the Court shall not appoint one person to serve as referee and listing agent; (3) Hon. Henry Low shall be appointed referee, subject to Plaintiff's oral opposition; (4) referee shall hire a listing agent; (5) 7 of the proposed Interlocutory Judgment shall remain; (6) all claims have been released by the parties in the Settlement. Defendant's request to include accounting procedure in the judgment is denied; (7) Plaintiff is entitled to recover attorney's fees per the settlement agreement. The amount of such fees to be determined by motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT VLADIMIR ABRAMOV'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to April 25, 2014. Court received Cross-Complainant's objections regarding non-receipt of the moving papers. Proof of personal service on file. Cross-Complainant may file its opposition, if any, and cross-defendant may file a reply, if any, in accordance with the new hearing date. Moving party is also ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT VLADIMIR ABRAMOV'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to April 25, 2014. Court received Cross-Complainant's objections regarding non-receipt of the moving papers. Proof of personal service on file. Cross-Complainant may file its opposition, if any, and cross-defendant may file a reply, if any, in accordance with the new hearing date. Moving party is also ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SCULPT GARDENS INC., A CORPORATION VS. MARK MARROCCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF SCULPT GARDENS INC., A CORP'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file and serve Second Amended Complaint forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT Sustained. Demurrer to the 1st and 17th affirmative defenses are sustained without leave to amend, as they are not recognized affirmative defenses. Demurer to the 2, 3, 5, 6, 8-16 is sustained with leave to amend, to allege facts, not conclusions, in support of each affirmative defense.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC VS. OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Tro
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 7. Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Tro GRANTED. Plaintiff shall post a bond for $340,000 no later than April 7, 2014.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VERONICA POLINIO VS. ANGELICA GARDUNO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 8. PLAINTIFF VERONICA POLINIO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Plaintiff failed to meet her burden and provide evidence regarding essential element of unlawful detainer, i.e. relationship between parties giving rise to unlawful detainer action.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALERIE LEE VS. MICHAEL W. SPENCER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPENCER'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons First Amended Complaint OFF CALENDAR. Notice of the Motion provides that it is brought by Michael W. Spencer. Motion is signed by counsel for Michael A. Spencer, Benjamin Martin. Michael W. Spencer did not appear in this case (no first appearance fee paid). Benjamin Martin is not counsel of record for Michael W. Spencer. Michael A. Spencer filed an answer to the First Amended Complaint on February 10, 2014. Motion is improper as to Michael A. Spencer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HELENA NONG VS. GABRIEL ONTIEROS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 28, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT GABRIEL ONTIVEROS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden. Defendant fails to show waiver under the circumstances of tender in this case or landlord's awareness of this tender. Defendant fails to show why, in the absence of waiver, notice demanding utilities cannot support this action. = (501/REQ)
